State Socioeconomic Indicators

Long-format Attribute-Value SES records use FIPS-like geo codes. State-level records end in 000; county-like rows are included as distractors.

state_ses_long.csv

Use geo_level and the 000 suffix together when extracting true state rows.

geo_fipsstategeo_namegeo_levelattributevalueunitextraction_note
01000ALAlabamastatePCTPOVALL_202312.7percentState rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors
01000ALAlabamastateMEDHHINC_202368631.0dollarsState rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors
01000ALAlabamastateUnemployment_rate_20234.2percentState rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors
01000ALAlabamastatePercent_bachelors_or_higher_2019_2334.6percentState rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors
01000ALAlabamastatePOP_ESTIMATE_202311213831personsState rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors
01000ALAlabamastateR_NET_MIG_2023-3.5per 1,000State rows end in 000; county-like rows below are distractors

Static Web portal. CSV downloads are served directly from /data/.
